title: nephrodium bulbiferum
intro: Nephrodium bulbiferum, also known as the Lady fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a demulcent and expectorant, to soothe irritated mucous membranes and relieve coughs. The health benefits of Nephrodium bulbiferum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
